summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SpectroBot trading platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (21/21 endpoints). Frontend navigation and core features functional. Minor UI issues with chart rendering and WebSocket connection identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height rendering as -1, causing display issues
ui_bugs.console_error: The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0

issues: React prop validation warnings for SVG fill attributes

passed_tests: All 21 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Dashboard page loading with price data display
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Trading, Backtest, Settings)
Strategy Signal card displaying BUY/SELL/HOLD signals
ML Prediction card with Train button functionality
Backtest page with Run Backtest simulation working
Technical indicators calculation (RSI, MACD, EMA, SuperTrend)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart rendering issues by ensuring proper container sizing for Recharts components. Fix WebSocket connection endpoint configuration for real-time price updates.
